hero.subtext: ON Medical Company is Egypt's specialized distributor of radiotherapy, radiation measurement, and medical physics systems — bridging leading international manufacturers with hospitals, oncology centres, and medical institutions.

companyIntro.label: About ON Medical
companyIntro.title: Egypt's Trusted Specialist in Oncology Technology
companyIntro.p1: ON Medical Company is a specialized Egyptian organization focused on the distribution, technical support, and market representation of advanced oncology and radiotherapy equipment. The name ON Medical reflects our defining focus — Oncology — and our commitment to advancing cancer treatment technology throughout Egypt.
companyIntro.p2: Since 2014, we have worked closely with hospitals, oncology centres, medical universities, and specialized institutes to supply high-precision equipment used in radiation therapy, radiation measurement, and treatment planning.
companyIntro.point2: Authorized market representation for global manufacturers

servicesPreview.label: What We Do
servicesPreview.title: End-to-End Medical Technology Services
servicesPreview.subtitle: From initial consultation through installation, training, and long-term support — ON Medical provides the complete service structure that Egyptian medical institutions require.
servicesPreview.s1Desc: Supply of specialist oncology, radiotherapy, and radiation measurement systems from globally authorized manufacturers.
servicesPreview.s2Desc: End-to-end installation, commissioning, and user training delivered by experienced technical professionals.
servicesPreview.s3Desc: Scheduled maintenance, calibration guidance, and prompt corrective support throughout the equipment lifecycle.
servicesPreview.s4Desc: Dosimetry systems, radiation measurement equipment, and quality assurance tools for clinical physics programs.
servicesPreview.s5Desc: Authorized Egyptian representation for international manufacturers — handling commercial, regulatory, and logistical aspects.
servicesPreview.s6Desc: Expert guidance on equipment selection, clinical workflow integration, and radiotherapy quality assurance program design.

whyChooseUs.label: Why ON Medical
whyChooseUs.title: The Standard for Specialized Medical Distribution
whyChooseUs.subtitle: We combine the reliability of international partnerships with on-the-ground technical expertise — delivering a level of service that Egyptian healthcare institutions depend on.
whyChooseUs.r1Desc: Our leadership brings decades of hands-on expertise in radiotherapy equipment, radiation dosimetry, and medical physics — expertise that generalist distributors cannot match.
whyChooseUs.r2Desc: Authorized partnerships with world-recognized manufacturers from Germany, the USA, and China, ensuring access to genuine, high-quality equipment.
whyChooseUs.r3Desc: Every transaction is conducted in strict accordance with Egyptian medical device import regulations, customs procedures, and healthcare standards.
whyChooseUs.r4Desc: We exclusively serve hospitals, oncology centres, medical universities, and government health institutions — organizations that demand precision and accountability.
whyChooseUs.r5Desc: Our leadership has contributed to peer-reviewed research in radiotherapy quality assurance and treatment planning, informing our consultative approach.
whyChooseUs.r6Desc: Our relationship with clients extends well beyond delivery. We provide ongoing maintenance support, calibration guidance, and technical consultation.

partnersPreview.label: Global Partnerships
partnersPreview.title: Representing World-Class Manufacturers
partnersPreview.subtitle: We are the authorized Egyptian representative for internationally recognized companies whose technologies set the standard in oncology and radiotherapy.

ptw.short: High-precision dosimetry systems and radiation measurement devices for radiotherapy quality assurance.

ashland.short: Specialized accessories and complementary measuring devices for teletherapy and brachytherapy applications.

klarity.short: Computer-controlled motorized patient translation couches for Total Body Irradiation procedures.

industries.label: Who We Serve
industries.title: Built for Healthcare Institutions
industries.subtitle: ON Medical partners with a wide range of Egyptian and regional healthcare organizations that depend on precision medical technology and professional support.
industries.i1Desc: Specialized cancer treatment hospitals requiring precision radiotherapy and dosimetry systems.
industries.i2Desc: Dedicated radiotherapy facilities serving cancer patients across Egypt.
industries.i3Desc: Academic institutions conducting research and training in medical physics.
industries.i4Desc: Ministry-affiliated hospitals and public oncology centres.
industries.i5Desc: High-end private hospitals and specialist medical centres.
industries.i6Desc: Scientific research bodies studying radiotherapy QA and treatment planning.

contactCTA.label: Get in Touch
contactCTA.title: Ready to Advance Your Oncology Services?
contactCTA.desc: Whether you represent a hospital, oncology centre, university, or an international manufacturer seeking an Egyptian partner — we are ready to discuss how ON Medical can support your needs.

footer.tagline: A specialized Egyptian company advancing oncology and radiotherapy technology throughout the healthcare sector since 2014.
footer.copyright: ON Medical Company. All rights reserved.

about.heroDesc: Since 2014, ON Medical Company has connected Egyptian healthcare with world-class radiotherapy, radiation measurement, and medical physics technologies — with the technical depth that specialized medicine demands.
about.overviewP1: ON Medical Company is a specialized Egyptian organization operating in the field of medical and oncology equipment distribution, technical support, and market representation for international manufacturers in Egypt.
about.overviewP2: The name "ON Medical" reflects the company's defining focus: Oncology. This commitment drives every aspect of our work, from the partners we choose to the institutions we serve.
about.overviewP3: We work closely with hospitals, oncology centres, medical universities, and specialized medical institutes to supply high-quality equipment and services used in radiation therapy, radiation measurement, and treatment planning — ensuring that the most advanced technologies reach the hands of Egyptian medical professionals.
about.overviewP4: ON Medical operates in full compliance with applicable medical device import regulations, customs procedures, and healthcare standards in Egypt, ensuring that all imported equipment is intended exclusively for legitimate medical and scientific use.
about.leadershipSubtitle: Over 20 years of hands-on expertise in medical physics, dosimetry, and radiotherapy — from field engineer to CEO and Managing Director of PTW Africa.
about.founderRole: CEO & Founder · Managing Director, PTW Africa
about.founderTitle: Biomedical Engineer · Nasr City, Cairo, Egypt
about.founderBio1: Mohammed Osama is a results-driven Biomedical Engineer with over 20 years of experience in medical physics, dosimetry, and healthcare technology. Beginning his career as a Field Engineer in 2005, he progressed through service management, institutional leadership, and international business — culminating in founding ON Medical Company in 2014 and being appointed Managing Director of PTW Africa in 2023.
about.founderBio2: He served as Supervisor Biomedical Engineer at Children Cancer Hospital (2020–2023), where he led the biomedical engineering team and managed Egypt's CyberKnife & Proton Therapy projects. He has personally commissioned over 40 linear accelerators and is a recognized expert in PTW dosimetry systems.
about.founderBio3: His academic contributions include two peer-reviewed publications in radiotherapy quality assurance and dosimetry, and he holds a Radioactive Source User License from Egypt's Atomic Energy Authority.
about.missionP1: To provide world-class representation and distribution services to the Egyptian healthcare market through strong partnerships with international manufacturers and by delivering reliable technical and commercial support to medical institutions.
about.missionP2: We are committed to contributing to the improvement of oncology and radiotherapy services in Egypt by introducing advanced technologies and ensuring their proper implementation in hospitals and medical centers.
about.visionP: ON Medical strives to become a leading specialized distributor in the Middle East and North Africa region for radiotherapy technology, radiation measurement equipment, and medical physics solutions.
about.visionGoal1: Expand partnerships with leading international manufacturers
about.visionGoal2: Introduce innovative medical technologies to the Egyptian market
about.visionGoal3: Support hospitals and treatment centers with reliable technical expertise
about.visionGoal4: Maintain the highest professional and ethical standards in medical distribution
about.visionGoal5: Build toward regional leadership across the Middle East and North Africa
about.historySubtitle: From foundational expertise to a growing network of institutional partnerships — the ON Medical story.
about.timeline_e1Desc: The founders of ON Medical begin their professional careers in radiation therapy technologies and medical physics, gaining hands-on experience with international companies and Egyptian healthcare institutions.
about.timeline_e2Desc: ON Medical Company is formally established in Cairo, Egypt, with a clear focus on oncology equipment distribution and market representation for international manufacturers.
about.timeline_e3Desc: The company develops partnerships with oncology hospitals, radiation therapy centres, medical universities, government health institutions, and private medical facilities.
about.timeline_e4Desc: ON Medical deepens its international partnerships and expands its technology portfolio, solidifying its position as a trusted specialist distributor in the Egyptian healthcare sector.
about.expertiseP1: The management and technical leadership of ON Medical possess extensive, hands-on experience spanning two decades in the Egyptian and international medical technology landscape. This is not a generalist operation — it is a company built by specialists, for specialists.
about.expertiseP2: Our technical leadership has also contributed to peer-reviewed scientific research and publications in the field of radiotherapy quality assurance and treatment planning — a foundation that informs our consultative approach and strengthens the trust placed in us by medical institutions.
about.researchSub: Radiotherapy quality assurance & treatment planning publications

services.heroDesc: From the first consultation to long-term after-sales support, ON Medical provides the full spectrum of services that Egyptian healthcare institutions require when working with specialized medical technology.
services.spec1Desc: Linear accelerators, treatment planning, and beam delivery quality assurance.
services.spec2Desc: Precision dosimetry, ionization chambers, and detector array systems.
services.spec3Desc: Technical consultation and tool supply for radiotherapy planning workflows.
services.spec4Desc: Full compliance with Egyptian medical device import regulations and standards.
services.coreSubtitle: Every service we provide is designed specifically for the demands of oncology, radiotherapy, and medical physics — not adapted from a generic medical distribution model.
services.processTitle: A Structured Approach from Enquiry to Support
services.processSubtitle: We follow a consistent, transparent process to ensure every client engagement is professionally managed from first contact through ongoing operations.
services.cs1Desc: We supply specialized oncology, radiotherapy, radiation measurement, and medical physics equipment sourced exclusively from internationally recognized manufacturers. Every product is genuine, properly imported, and compliant with Egyptian medical device regulations.
services.cs2Desc: ON Medical acts as the authorized Egyptian representative for carefully selected international manufacturers. We manage the commercial, regulatory, and logistical aspects of bringing specialized medical technology to the Egyptian healthcare market.
services.cs3Desc: Our experienced team manages the full technical lifecycle of each delivered system. From site survey and installation planning through to commissioning and handover, we ensure every system is ready for clinical use.
services.cs4Desc: We maintain a long-term commitment to every institution we serve. Our after-sales program ensures that equipment remains operational, calibrated, and performing to manufacturer specifications throughout its service life.
services.cs5Desc: Drawing on deep expertise in radiotherapy and medical physics, our team provides consultative guidance to help institutions select the right technologies, plan implementations, and optimize their existing systems.
services.cs6Desc: We provide specialized support for medical physics programs, from dosimetry equipment supply and calibration tooling to ongoing consultation for radiotherapy QA programs at hospitals and academic institutions.
services.proc1Desc: We begin with a thorough discussion of your institution's clinical requirements, budget parameters, and timeline.
services.proc2Desc: Our technical team evaluates your existing setup and recommends appropriate equipment and solutions.
services.proc3Desc: We present a detailed commercial proposal including equipment specifications, pricing, and service terms.
services.proc4Desc: Equipment is imported through proper regulatory channels, with all documentation handled by our team.
services.proc5Desc: Professional installation, testing, and commissioning ensure the system is clinically ready.
services.proc6Desc: Comprehensive user training is conducted before formal system handover to your team.
services.proc7Desc: Long-term after-sales support, maintenance, and technical consultation maintain peak performance.

partners.heroDesc: ON Medical Company is the authorized Egyptian representative for three internationally recognized manufacturers — each a leader in their field of oncology, radiotherapy, and medical physics technology.
partners.ptwTagline: The World Standard in Radiation Dosimetry
partners.ptwDesc: PTW Freiburg is the global leader in radiation dosimetry instrumentation, providing clinical users with precise and reliable measurement tools for radiotherapy quality assurance. Founded in Germany, PTW's instruments are trusted in oncology centres and academic institutions across more than 100 countries. ON Medical Company is the authorized Egyptian representative for PTW Freiburg, delivering their full product portfolio to healthcare providers throughout Egypt.
partners.ashlandTagline: Advanced Film Dosimetry for Radiotherapy QA
partners.ashlandDesc: Ashland Medical is a leading American manufacturer of specialized Gafchromic dosimetry films and related measurement products used widely in radiation therapy quality assurance programs. Their film systems provide accurate 2D and 3D dose verification for modern radiotherapy techniques. ON Medical distributes Ashland Medical products in Egypt, supporting clinical medical physics programs at oncology hospitals and treatment centres.
partners.klarityTagline: Precision Patient Positioning for Radiation Therapy
partners.klarityDesc: Klarity is a specialized manufacturer of patient immobilization and positioning systems used in radiation therapy. Their product range includes thermoplastic masks, head and neck immobilization solutions, and motorized patient translation couches for Total Body Irradiation. ON Medical represents Klarity in Egypt, bringing their precision positioning technology to radiotherapy departments throughout the country.
partners.techTitle: A Broad Range of Specialized Equipment
partners.techSubtitle: The combined technology portfolio of our three manufacturing partners covers the key areas of oncology, radiotherapy, and medical physics.

contact.heroDesc: Whether you are a hospital seeking specialized equipment, an oncology centre requiring technical support, or an international manufacturer looking for an authorized Egyptian representative — we are ready to help.
contact.contactInfoDesc: Our team is available during business hours to assist with enquiries, technical questions, and commercial discussions.
contact.whoWeHelpTitle: Serving Every Corner of Egyptian Healthcare
contact.whoWeHelpSubtitle: Wherever you are in the medical sector, ON Medical has the expertise and partnerships to support your specific needs.
contact.card1Desc: Seeking specialized radiotherapy or dosimetry equipment? Our team is ready to assist with product selection, pricing, and technical specifications.
contact.card2Desc: We support academic institutions and research bodies with medical physics equipment and technical consultation services.
contact.card3Desc: Looking for authorized representation in Egypt? We have the network, compliance expertise, and technical credibility to represent your brand.
contact.faqSubtitle: Answers to common questions from hospitals, medical centres, and international partners.
contact.faq1Q: What types of institutions do you supply?
contact.faq1A: We supply oncology hospitals, radiation therapy centres, medical universities, government health institutions, research institutes, and private medical facilities throughout Egypt. Every engagement is tailored to the specific technical and operational requirements of the institution.
contact.faq2Q: Do you provide after-sales support for all equipment you supply?
contact.faq2A: Yes. We provide long-term after-sales service, preventive maintenance guidance, calibration support, and ongoing technical consultation for all equipment distributed through ON Medical. Our commitment extends well beyond the point of delivery.
contact.faq3Q: Are you the authorized representative for your partner manufacturers?
contact.faq3A: Yes. ON Medical is the authorized Egyptian market representative for PTW Freiburg (Germany), Ashland Medical (USA), and Klarity (China). All equipment is sourced directly from these manufacturers and imported in full compliance with Egyptian medical device regulations.
contact.faq4Q: Are you compliant with Egyptian medical device import regulations?
contact.faq4A: Absolutely. All imports are conducted in strict accordance with Egyptian medical device regulations, customs procedures, and applicable healthcare standards. All equipment imported and distributed by ON Medical is intended exclusively for legitimate medical and scientific use.
contact.faq5Q: Can international manufacturers contact you about representation in Egypt?
contact.faq5A: Yes. We welcome discussions with specialized international manufacturers seeking professional representation in the Egyptian market. ON Medical has the institutional network, regulatory knowledge, and technical credibility to represent focused medical technology brands. Please use the enquiry form or contact us directly at osama@onmedical.net.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill in the form below and we will respond within one business day.
contact.formConsent: By submitting this form, you consent to ON Medical Company contacting you regarding your enquiry. Your information will not be shared with third parties.
contact.formSuccessDesc: Thank you for reaching out to ON Medical Company. A member of our team will review your message and respond within one business day.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Please describe your requirements, the equipment you are interested in, or any questions you have for our team…
